body:
## Summary
- Tailwind v4 no longer requires a `tailwind.config.js` file, but the LSP still expects a global stylesheet to be provided via `experimental.configFile`. This PR automatically locates a stylesheet in the project root that contains `@import 'tailwindcss';` and assigns its path to `experimental.configFile`. This ensures proper Tailwind v4 support without requiring a manual config file.
- Trying to close #4204

comment_data.body: This will get executed when the module is loaded, which depends on the user config/plugins/etc. Why not do this in `before_init`? There is already a `before_init` below, just move this there ...

comment_data.diff_hunk:
@@ -6,6 +6,43 @@
 --- npm install -g @tailwindcss/language-server
 local util = require 'lspconfig.util'
 
+local function find_tailwind_global_css()
+  local target = "@import 'tailwindcss';"
+
+  -- Find project root using `.git`
+  local buf = vim.api.nvim_get_current_buf()
+  local root = vim.fs.root(buf, function(name)
+    return name == '.git'
+  end)
+
+  if not root then
+    return nil -- no project root found
+  end
+
+  -- Find stylesheet files in the project root (recursively)
+  local files = vim.fs.find(function(name)
+    return name:match('%.css$') or name:match('%.scss$') or name:match('%.pcss$')
+  end, {
+    path = root,
+    type = 'file',
+    limit = math.huge, -- search full tree
+  })
+
+  for _, path in ipairs(files) do
+    local f = io.open(path, 'r')
+    if f then
+      local content = f:read('*a')
+      f:close()

comment_data.body:
is `config.settings.tailwindCSS` guaranteed to exist? also, this will overwrite any existing `experimental` object.

you need to do something like this:


```suggestion
    config.settings.tailwindCSS = config.settings.tailwindCSS or {}
    config.settings.tailwindCSS.experimental = config.settings.tailwindCSS.experimental or {}
    config.settings.tailwindCSS.experimental.configFile = find_tailwind_global_css()
```

title: fix(tailwindcss_ls): automatic add tailwind global css file to experimental.configFile in order to support Tailwind v4
